name: Nishi-Nippon Railroad Co., Ltd.
summary: Nishi-Nippon Railroad Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the transportation business in Japan. It offers railway, taxi, and public and tourist bus transportation services. The company is also involved in the leasing of office, commercial, and other buildings; construction and sale of condominiums, detached houses, and new town developments, as well as a range of other developments; and operation of supermarkets and liquor stores. In addition, it provides air cargo handling and customs brokerage services; manages amusement park, garden, and aquarium facilities; operates hotels; produces and sells strawberries; offers agricultural management and production technologies training; and provides IC cards. The company was founded in 1908 and is headquartered in Fukuoka, Japan.
